title: dendranthema zawadzkii var. leiophyllum
intro: Dendranthema zawadzkii var. leiophyllum, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum or Leiophyllum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema zawadzkii var. leiophyllum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and colds, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
